global_summary: This week needs 138 work-days company-wide, with 107 due today but only 29 earned and the one scheduled start not begun. Every project trails its weekly plan, echoing last week's misses across Jul 6-12. Prioritize tiles, trims, rough-ins and Karim's concrete pour to close the gap.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Nothing done yet this week toward the painting target; 7 of 21 expected work-days earned. Paint by Sat Jul 18 and finish final cleaning by Thu Jul 16.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: None of this week's 5 tasks done and tile install slipped to Fri Jul 24. Install tiles by Fri Jul 24 to stop further drift.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: No progress on this week's 4 tasks; glass install pushed to Tue Jul 21. Install glass by Tue Jul 21 to recover the week.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Zero of 12 tasks done this week; 14 of 34 expected work-days earned. Install plumbing trim and tiles by Fri Jul 17.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Slip: 27% of the month plan (11.0 of 20.0 expected work-days done; 3/15 tasks). Key move: PROJECT CLEANING - FRAMING: PROJECT CLEANING / HAUL (Thu Jul 30 → Mon Aug 10, +11d).

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Slip: 31% of the month plan (29.0 of 45.0 expected work-days done; 7/20 tasks). Key move: GLASS: INSTALL GLASS (Sat Jul 11 → Wed Jul 29, +18d).

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: One of seven tasks done and the siding start slipped to August. Finish framing by Fri Jul 17 to clear the MEP rough-in inspection.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Nearly on pace, but zero of two tasks done this week. Finish drywall tape and texture by Fri Jul 17, then start interior paint by Sat Jul 18.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Two of six tasks done and the week is still savable. Finish electrical, mechanical and plumbing rough-in by Fri Jul 17.
